BUSINESS GLOSSARY - Enterprise System
Last Updated: 2024-03-15
Status: Partial (pending review)

==========================================
CUSTOMER MANAGEMENT
==========================================

Customer
An individual or organization that... [definition incomplete]

Client
A person or company that purchases goods or services. (Note: may be used interchangeably with Customer in some contexts)

Account Holder
The person designated as the primary owner of an account. Similar to Customer bu... [TRUNCATED]

Last Updated: 2024-02-28

triplets.subject: Account Holder
triplets.object: the person designated as the primary owner of an account

triplets.subject: End User
triplets.object: the actual user of a product or service

triplets.subject: Order
triplets.object: A request to purchase products or services

triplets.subject: Transaction
triplets.object: Similar to Order but more general

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: An order with confirmed pricing and inventory allocation

triplets.subject: Quote
triplets.object: A preliminary order with estimated pricing, not yet confirmed

triplets.subject: Payment
triplets.object: The transfer of money to settle an order

triplets.subject: Shipment
triplets.object: The process of delivering goods to a customer

triplets.subject: Delivery
triplets.object: The completion of a Shipment when goods reach the customer

triplets.subject: Fulfillment
triplets.object: The process of preparing and delivering orders

entities_post_resolution.name: Request To Purchase
entities_post_resolution.definition: An invoice is a document issued to request payment for goods or services.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Order
A request to purchase products or services. Can be in various states. | Invoice
A document requesting payment. Related to Bill. | Bill
A statement of money owed. Similar to Invoice. | Receipt
Proof of payment. Generated after Payment is processed. | Purchase
The act of buying something. Related to Order and Transaction.

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: A customers dataset/table representing individuals or organizations that purchase goods or services, identified by a primary key such as customer_id or CustomerID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
customer_id → CUSTOMERS(customer_id or CustomerID?) | CustomerID | INTEGER | FK | [FK reference unclear] | | Primary Key: customer_id (or is it CustomerID? check with DBA) | Client
A person or company that purchases goods or services. (Note: may be used interchangeably with Customer in some contexts) | Customer
An individual or organization that... [definition incomplete] | | CustomerID | INTEGER | ? | Possible duplicate of customer_id | | | customer_type | VARCHAR(30) | ? | [missing documentation] | | PRODUCTS (or INVENTORY_ITEMS?)
==========================================
Primary Key: [conflicting documentation]

| Column Name | Data Type | Constraints | Description |
|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| product_id | INTEGER | PK | Unique product identifier |

entities_post_resolution.name: Financial Transaction
entities_post_resolution.definition: An event in which monetary value is exchanged between parties, typically involving a payment or settlement.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Financial Transaction
Any monetary exchange. See Payment, Transaction. | Transaction
Similar to Order but more general. May refer to any exchange of value.

entities_post_resolution.name: Revenue From Selling Products
entities_post_resolution.definition: Total revenue generated from the sale of goods to customers.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Sales
Revenue from selling products. See Revenue. | Revenue
Income from sales. The same as... [definition circular, see Sales]

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Item Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: ORDER_ITEMS represents the line-item records associated with an order, identified by order_item_id and linked to the parent ORDERS by order_id, capturing the individual items in an order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
ORDER_ITEMS (or ORDER_DETAILS?)
==========================================
Primary Key: [undocumented]

| Column Name | Data Type | Constraints | Description |
|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| order_item_id | INTEGER | PK | [missing documentation] | | Primary Key: order_id (or OrderID - verify) | | order_id | INTEGER | FK | References ORDERS | | | product_id | INTEGER | FK | References PRODUCTS (or INVENTORY?) | | | ProductID | INTEGER | FK | [inconsistent naming] | | Order
A request to purchase products or services. Can be in various states. | | OrderID | INTEGER | ? | [possible duplicate] | | Sales Order
An order with confirmed pricing and inventory allocation. Distinct from Quote.

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment Status
entities_post_resolution.definition: Payment Status is the current state of a payment transaction (e.g., Pending, Awaiting processing).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Payment Status:
- Pending: Awaiting processing | ==========================================
PAYMENTS
==========================================

Primary Key: payment_id (unverified) | Payment
The transfer of money to settle an order.

entities_post_resolution.name: Products
entities_post_resolution.definition: A product is an item offered for sale, represented as records in the PRODUCTS table and identified by a unique product_id.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| product_id | INTEGER | FK | References PRODUCTS (or INVENTORY?) | | PRODUCTS (or INVENTORY_ITEMS?)
==========================================

| Column Name | Data Type | Constraints | Description |
|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|

| ProductID | INTEGER | ? | [possible duplicate] | | | stock_quantity | INTEGER | ? | [missing documentation] | | | quantity_in_stock | INTEGER | ? | [duplicate?] | | | is_active | BOOLEAN | ? | [missing documentation] | | | created_at | TIMESTAMP | ? | [missing documentation] | | | updated_at | TIMESTAMP | ? | [missing documentation] | | Product
A thing that is... [definition needs clarification]

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Fulfillment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Order fulfillment is the end-to-end business process of receiving customer orders, preparing them for shipment, and delivering the products to customers, encompassing shipment and delivery steps.
synonyms: The process of delivering goods to a customer
The process of preparing and delivering orders
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Shipment
The process of delivering goods to a customer. | Fulfillment
The process of preparing and delivering orders. Encompasses Shipment and Delivery.

entities_post_resolution.name: Account Status
entities_post_resolution.definition: A data field that stores the current status of an account (e.g., active, suspended, closed) in a VARCHAR(20).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | account_status | VARCHAR(20) | ? | [missing values documentation] | | | status | VARCHAR(20) | ? | [duplicate?] |

entities_post_resolution.name: Stock Quantity
entities_post_resolution.definition: The on-hand quantity of stock available for an item in inventory.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | stock_quantity | INTEGER | ? | [missing documentation] | | | quantity_in_stock | INTEGER | ? | [duplicate?] |

entities_post_resolution.name: Cancelled
entities_post_resolution.definition: Cancelled: an order status indicating the order was terminated before it could be completed.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Order Status:
- Cancelled: Terminated before completion | Order Status:
- Failed: [definition missing]

entities_post_resolution.name: Fulfillment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Fulfillment is the process of preparing, packing, shipping, and delivering customer orders.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Fulfillment
The process of preparing and delivering orders. Encompasses Shipment and Delivery. | Order Status:
- Completed: Finished successfully

entities_post_resolution.name: On Hold
entities_post_resolution.definition: A workflow status indicating that an order or payment event is temporarily suspended and awaiting further action.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Order Status:
- On Hold: Temporarily suspended | Order Status:
- Pending: Not yet processed | Payment Status:
- Pending: Awaiting processing

entities_post_resolution.name: Varchar(100)
entities_post_resolution.definition: VARCHAR(255) represents a variable-length text field in a database with a maximum of 255 characters, used to store short textual values such as emails or names.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | last_name | VARCHAR(100) | ? | [appears to be duplicate] | | | phone | VARCHAR(20) | ? | Contact phone number | | | phoneNumber | VARCHAR(20) | ? | [possible duplicate] | | | account_status | VARCHAR(20) | ? | [missing values documentation] | | | status | VARCHAR(20) | ? | [duplicate?] | | | email | VARCHAR(255) | ? | Email address | | | emailAddress | VARCHAR(255) | ? | [possible duplicate] | | | customer_type | VARCHAR(30) | ? | [missing documentation] | | | firstName | VARCHAR(50) | ? | Customer's first name | | | first_name | VARCHAR(50) | ? | [appears to be duplicate] | | | lastName | VARCHAR(50) | ? | Customer's last name | | | customer_region | VARCHAR(50) | ? | Geographic region |

entities_post_resolution.name: First Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: FirstName represents the given name (the customer's first name) as a discrete attribute in the data model.

tables_enriched.name: Customer
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about customers, including contact details, account status, type, and regional data for the customer base.

tables_enriched.name: Orders
tables_enriched.description: Stores orders and related financial and status details for customers, including amounts, taxes, payment info, and timestamps.

tables_enriched.name: Order Items
tables_enriched.description: Stores the items included in each order, including product references, quantity, pricing, discounts, and the calculated line total.

tables_enriched.name: Products
tables_enriched.description: Stores core product catalog data including identifiers, names, SKUs, categories, pricing, stock levels, activation status, timestamps, and descriptive details for each product.

tables_enriched.name: Payments
tables_enriched.description: Stores payment transactions and their associated details, including amounts, methods, statuses, and responses for orders placed by customers.
